name: Clinical FHIR Assistant
description: A clinical assistant agent for healthcare organizations that interprets natural language requests from doctors, nurses, and hospital admins and maps them to FHIR R4 API operations. Supports patient lookup, medication retrieval, and appointment search and creation with role-based access control.

authentication.description: Requires a valid OAuth 2.0 bearer token obtained via Authorization Code + PKCE flow. The token must include the user's role claim (doctor, nurse, or hospitaladmin). Medication access is restricted to the doctor role. Appointment creation is restricted to nurse and hospitaladmin roles.

skills.name: Get Patient by ID
skills.description: Retrieve a specific patient record by FHIR Patient ID. Restricted to the doctor role.
examples: Show me the record for patient pat-222

skills.name: Get Patient by Name
skills.description: Search for a patient by first and last name. Available to doctors, nurses, and hospital admins.

skills.name: Get Patient Medication by Patient ID
skills.description: Retrieve a patient's medication record by their FHIR Patient ID. Restricted to the doctor role.
examples: Show me the medications for patient pat-001

skills.name: Get Appointments
skills.description: Search for appointments starting from a given date. Requires a date. Available to doctors, nurses, and hospital admins.
examples: Get all appointments starting from July 1st 2026

skills.name: Create Appointment
skills.description: Create a new appointment for a patient. Requires patient ID, patient name, start and end date/time. Restricted to nurse and hospitaladmin roles.
examples: Book an appointment for patient pat-001 John Smith on June 15th at 9am for 30 minutes
Schedule an appointment for Jane Doe starting July 10th at 2pm for 1 hour
Create a 30 minute appointment for patient pat-003 on August 1st at 10am
